# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

We are committed to providing security updates for the latest major version of CloudClaw.

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| 1.x.x   | :white_check_mark: |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

We take security very seriously. If you discover a security vulnerability, please do **not** open a public issue. Instead, please report it to us privately.

To report a vulnerability, please send an email.

We will do our best to respond to your report within 48 hours and will work with you to understand and resolve the issue. We appreciate your efforts to disclose your findings responsibly.
